modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Refund processing issue on Touch Dynamic QK10 POS register.

full_description_text: The user was attempting to process a refund on the Touch Dynamic QK10 POS register. They encountered difficulties while trying to refund a sale made during troubleshooting. The situation requires immediate attention to resolve the refund process.
short_description: Refund processing issue on Touch Dynamic QK10 POS register.
description: The user was attempting to process a refund on the Touch Dynamic QK10 POS register. They encountered difficulties while trying to refund a sale made during troubleshooting. The situation requires immediate attention to resolve the refund process.
